intro: Synaedrys sundaica, also known as the Sundan Sageretia or simply Sageretia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Synaedrys sundaica include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Synaedrys sundaica is commonly used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into herbal tonics and supplements.
